case_title: KRYSTAL BITTENCOURT MUNIZ VS. PAUL DOUGLAS BETTENCOURT

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNIZ, KRYSTAL BITTENCOURT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BETTENCOURT, PAUL DOUGLAS $3,371.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,421.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-27-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KRYSTAL BETTENCOURT MUNIZ. DEFENDANT PAUL DOUGLAS BETTENCOURT DID NOT APPEAR. PREVIOUS PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. SERVICE MUST BE REDONE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BETTENCOURT, PAUL DOUGLAS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,371.80 FILED BY MUNIZ, KRYSTAL BITTENCOURT AS TO DEFENDANT BETTENCOURT, PAUL DOUGLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2019 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-09-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR KRYSTAL BITTENCOURT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAUL DOUGLAS BETTENCOURT IS PRESENT. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON GRANTED A 3 MONTH CONTINUANE FOR PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR A STATUS CHECK ON THE DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO SEE IF HIS CONDITIONS IMPROVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR STATUS REPORT ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR KRYSTAL BITTENCOURT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAUL DOUGLAS BETTENCOURT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
